name: Banana Fudge Baby Cakes
recipeIngredient: 1 (15.1-oz.) pkg. Pillsbury Thick 'n Fudgy Hot Fudge Swirl Deluxe Brownie Mix
1 cup semisweet chocolate chips, melted and cooled
3/4 cup chopped pecans or macadamia nuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Spray 12 nonstick muffin cups with nonstick cooking spray.
3. Place the unopened fudge packet from the brownie mix in a bowl and cover with warm water to soften.
4. In a large bowl, combine the melted chocolate chips, mashed bananas, melted butter, vanilla extract, and eggs. Mix until smooth.
5. Add the brownie mix and beat for 50 strokes using a spoon.
6. Divide half of the batter evenly among the sprayed muffin cups (cups will be slightly less than half full).
7. Cut off the small corner of the fudge packet.
8. Squeeze about 1 teaspoon of fudge filling into the center of each muffin cup.
9. Top with remaining batter and sprinkle chopped pecans over the batter, pressing gently.
10. Bake for 20 to 27 minutes or until the edges are set (centers will be soft). Let cool for 3 minutes.
11. Run a knife around the edge of each cake to loosen and remove from muffin cups.
12. Drizzle chocolate-flavored syrup decoratively onto each serving plate.
13. Top each cake with warm cake and drizzle with additional syrup.
14. Sprinkle powdered sugar over the top and serve with vanilla ice cream.
12 servings.
